faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about lead generation services in Guwahati.

items.question: Which lead generation channels work for businesses in Guwahati?
items.answer: The right mix depends on your audience and offer. Campaigns may use Google Ads, Meta Ads, landing pages, WhatsApp, remarketing, and other targeted digital channels.

items.question: How do you measure lead quality?
items.answer: We align targeting and conversion tracking with your qualification criteria, then optimize campaigns using lead quality and sales feedback.

items.question: Can you connect campaign leads with our CRM?
items.answer: Yes. We can plan lead capture and integration workflows for supported CRMs, email tools, spreadsheets, and other business systems.

items.question: How quickly can a lead generation campaign start?
items.answer: Timelines depend on strategy, creative assets, landing pages, tracking, and approvals. We provide a launch plan after reviewing your requirements.
